name: expansionist-stagnation-relief
description: Tests v0.41 expansionist stagnation relief via new treaty signing. Nicaragua and Guatemala both have expansionist=0.7. No territory acquired. Phase 1 (T12+): With EXPANSIONIST_GROWTH_WINDOW=10, stagnation fires at harness T12 (engine processes world.tick=11 > 10). Phase 2: A non_aggression treaty is created at T13 — harness injects it with tickStarted=world.tick=12; engine runs with world.tick=12 and detects tickStarted===world.tick → relief fires → latestAcquisitionTickByNation[nic]=12. T14: ticksSinceGrowth=13−12=1 ≤ 10 → stagnation GONE for Nicaragua. Guatemala (no treaty) continues stagnating (ticksSinceGrowth=13 > 10). Validates: treaty relief check uses world.tick (pre-tick) not world.tick+1.

payload.comment: T12: engine processes world.tick=11 > EXPANSIONIST_GROWTH_WINDOW=10 → stagnation fires first time (no acquisitions, no treaties yet)

T14: treaty injected at T13 had tickStarted=world.tick=12; engine runs T13 with world.tick=12, detects tickStarted===world.tick → relief fires → latestAcq[nic]=12. At T14 engine sees world.tick=13, ticksSinceGrowth=13−12=1 ≤ 10 → NO stagnation
T14: control group — guatemala has no treaty, ticksSinceGrowth=13 > 10 → still stagnating
